name: Mr. Pibb Pralines
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mr. Pibb (can substitute Dr. Pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars and Mr. Pibb in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Gradually bring to the soft-ball stage (240).
3. Remove mixture from heat; stir in marshmallows and pecans.
4. Mix vigorously until marshmallows dissolve.
5. Quickly drop by tablespoon onto wax paper to cool.
6. Makes 2 dozen pralines.
